## Framework / Provider
Name and link to the framework or provider.

## Use Case
How you'd use this integration.

## API Surface
Brief description of the API that needs wrapping (if known).

## Willing to Contribute?
- [ ] I'd be willing to help implement this integration
- [ ] I can help test this integration

## Additional Context
Links to documentation, examples, etc.
